message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - got the corn dog copy ready for your eyes whenever you are.
Let me see it - strip out anything about "crispy golden nostalgia" or whatever poetic nonsense you're tempted by.
Fair point - I cut that language already, actually learned my lesson last time you called me out on burying the real story.
Good. So what's left - just the technique and the heat management?
Yeah, I think that's exactly what we need - the technique stuff is what actually teaches people something.
The technique angle is what stuck with people on the last batch - you're right about that. I'll lock this version and call it done.
